# Homes with Komal

> Komal Sharma is a licensed real estate agent at John L. Scott Real Estate, serving buyers and sellers across the Eastside Seattle area and Greater King County, Washington.

## About

Komal Sharma helps first-time home buyers, growing families, move-up and downsize sellers, new construction buyers, and investors navigate the real estate process with patience, honesty, and no shortcuts. She speaks English and Hindi.

Her primary service area includes Sammamish, Redmond, Woodinville, Issaquah, Bellevue, and Greater Seattle.

Her personal philosophy: "Patience is the key."

## Brokerage

John L. Scott Real Estate — Sammamish, WA
